title: scorzoneroides autumnalis var. pratensis
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. pratensis, also known as Autumnal Knawel, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. pratensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. pratensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
